message:
Upgrade dependencies, Rust toolchain, and refine compilation helpers

Dependency and toolchain upgrades:
- Bump Rust toolchain version in rust-toolchain.toml
- Update dependency versions across workspace Cargo.toml and all crate
  manifests (rch, rchd, rch-common, rch-telemetry)
- Refresh Cargo.lock with updated dependency tree
- Add UPGRADE_LOG.md tracking upgrade history

Source refinements:
- rch-common/cargo_path_deps.rs: Adjust path dependency resolution logic
  for improved correctness with workspace-relative paths
- rch-common/dependency_closure_planner.rs: Refine dependency closure
  planning to handle edge cases in transitive dependency graphs
- rch-common/types.rs: Update type definitions for compatibility with
  newer dependency versions
- rchd/selection.rs: Adjust worker selection logic for updated API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
